series_metadata.series_description: Records document the amount of monies collected from processing fees, court costs, genetic testing lab contracts, as well as other fees the county may have advanced from their administrative fund that need to be repaid. Files include, but are not limited to county email requests housed within the "FC_MC_Requests"(name of e-mail account).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office child support case is closed. ; Electronic: in office child support case is closed
